headline: Iran-linked Diet Coke shortage sparks viral party trend in India
summary: India’s Diet Coke shortage has triggered a viral social media trend, with “Diet Coke parties” popping up across major cities. Linked to shipping delays in the Strait of Hormuz, the shortage has turned the soft drink into a lifestyle symbol among young consumers. Bars, restaurants and influencers are cashing in with themed events, cocktails, raffles and exclusive merchandise driven by scarcity and online hype.
